titleStmt.title: SII 15.78: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 78. (B.K. No. 6 of 1930-31.) HULBENCHI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the temple of Hanumān.

This record refers itself to the reign of Sōmēśvara IV whose victory over his adversaries including the Kalachuris is described. It then introduces the king's subordinate Kumāra Bammarasa-daṇḍanātha who is credited in a lengthy praśasti with victory over the Hoysaḷas, the Chōḷas of Velnāḍu and the king of Māḷava. The epigraph is broken and the other details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirā
ṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ srīmat vīrasōmē
jyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salutta
cakrēśana balupanadēvēḷvudō vairibhūbhṛdbaḷamaṁ mārkkoṁḍu saṁgrāmadoḷibhagha
thaṁgaḷanudyatkhaḻgadiṁdaṁ taṟidu kaḷacuridrōharaṁ koṁdu dhātrītaḷamaṁ kaikoṁḍu
mēśabhūpaṁ . lāḷana cōḷana cēranṛpāḷanaṟeyaṭṭi muṭṭikappaṁgoṁḍa māḷava
lāmananippa sōmanṛpāḷaṁ . © svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāpracaṁḍa daṁḍa
dāyakaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati mahāpasāyitaṁ bāhattara niyō
deṁḍanāthamastakaśūlaṁ ripukuḷakāla rāyadaṁḍanāthakumāra gaṁḍapeṁḍāraṁ Ēkaika
va kumārara gaṁḍa garvvavaṁ kalakuvaṁ muḷivarana maṁkuvaṁ hoysaṇadiśāpaṭṭaṁ Ādi
kanivaḷivaṭṭaṁ Allumillavelnāḍacōḷeyasarvvasvasūṟekāṟaṁ gaṁḍaroḷnīṟaṁ
laṁgoṁḍaṁ māḷavarāyakāḷadaṁḍaṁ nuḍidaṁta gaṁḍaṁ vēraḍigara talegoṁḍaṁ viṣamaha
khārēvantaṁ vīralakṣmīkāṁtaṁ Ārōhakabhagadattaṁ pararoḷudvṛttaṁ subhaṭaroḍḍaḷi
paranārīsahōdaraṁ śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaraṁ maṁtricūḍāmaṇi subhaṭa
rakaṁ sōmanāthapādārādhakaṁ raṇaraṁgabhīmaṁ caladaṁkarāmaṁ kaḷacuriya
rājyōddharaṇaṁ nāmādi praśastisahitaṁ śrīmatkumāraṁ baṁmarasadaṁḍanā
bhaṭakōṭiyanudghavīraṁ bhujabaḷadiṁde tāṁ kali
Digital edition of SII 15.78 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
